no_favorites.title: Nta kintu kiri hano :(
no_favorites.subtitle: Ongeraho ibyo ukunda ku ipaji yo gushakisha kugira ngo ubibone hano

local_list.title: Ibintu nabitse
local_list.description: Ibikoresho ubitse hano bibikwa muri mushakisha yawe. Injira kugira ngo ubikomeze mu bikoresho bitandukanye.
local_list.empty_description: Kanda ku gishushanyo cy'umutima ku isoko iryo ari ryo ryose kugira ngo wongereho hano. Amahitamo yawe abikwa muri iyi porogaramu.

purge_list.label: Siba byose
purge_list.confirm_description: Ibi bizakuraho umutungo wose kuri urwo rutonde. Urutonde ubwarwo ruzagumaho.

print_dialog.title: Ububiko bw'Icapiro
print_dialog.phone_book_desc: Imiterere mito irimo amakuru y'ingenzi yo guhamagara
print_dialog.popup_blocked: Idirishya ryafunzwe. Nyamuneka emera ko idirishya ryakira imbonerahamwe ya PDF.
print_dialog.error: Byananiwe gukora PDF. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze.

print_footer_disclaimer: {{brandName}} itanga aya makuru nk'urwego rushinzwe rubanda kandi nta garanti itanga ku bijyanye n'ukuri kwayo, ubuziranenge bwayo, cyangwa igihe cyayo. {{brandName}} ntabwo ari we ubishinzwe uburyo aya makuru akoreshwa kandi nta ngaruka afite ku biva mu kuyakoresha. Gukwirakwiza iyi nyandiko ntibivuze ko yemejwe cyangwa ifitanye isano na {{brandName}}.

tooltips.purge: Kuraho ibyo ukunda byose kuri uru rutonde
